textByHash.59f290a78468765d938467fad2e20b7823d6ecac: Oh, yes. Sorry, I've just been sent over to collect some of Elder Degga's things. She passed away a few days ago.
textByHash.f96375b8a55701a8c19723ac728e86a152abbd89: It's okay. Elder Coco is showing me how to make a remembrance basket. We weave them specially and fill them with things that were important to the one who's gone.
